summary: High‑quality audience recording with a killer second set highlighted by a stellar Help on the Way.
review: Both reviewers praise the audio fidelity of this audience tape, calling it one of the best‑sounding versions available. The performance, especially the second set and the Help on the Way segment, is described as “major ass” and trippy, making the show worth a listen despite limited detail on the rest of the set.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong praise for sound quality and second‑set performance balances with only two reviews (one moderate) and limited detail on the full show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note unusually high fidelity for an audience source, crediting the engineers for a clear, balanced mix that stands out among other versions.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as especially energetic and trippy; overall flow not extensively discussed.
